error_signature: Month is in French when English is selected
title: Incorrect month language in date format
symptom: When switching to English, the month in the date format remains in French instead of changing to English.
applies_when: Date format is bound to language selection
not_this_if: Date format is correctly displaying in both languages
root_cause: The date format is being pulled from the browser's language settings, which may default to French if the browser is set to that language. This causes the month to display in French even when the English button is clicked.
fix_steps: Install the Date Plugin in WeWeb.
Use the 'formatDate' formula with parameters: Actual Date, desired Format, and Locale.
Set the Locale parameter to 'en' for English and 'fr' for French based on the button clicked.
agent_instruction: Implement the Date Plugin and adjust the date formatting logic to use the correct locale based on user selection.
